# Requirements Quality Checklist: Use Case Specification Expansion

**Purpose**: Validate the completeness, clarity, consistency, and coverage of the UC-01 to UC-23 requirements and acceptance scenarios.
**Created**: February 6, 2026
**Feature**: /home/ajchan/ECE493/lab/lab2/493-lab2-final/specs/001-usecase-specification/spec.md

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all 23 user stories present with explicit requirements beyond narrative flow descriptions? [Completeness, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]
- [x] CHK002 Are role-based access requirements specified for every user story (guest, author, reviewer, editor, attendee)? [Completeness, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]
- [x] CHK003 Are required data fields defined for registration, submission, review, scheduling, registration, and ticketing flows? [Completeness, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §User Story 6, Spec §User Story 14, Spec §User Story 18, Spec §User Story 21, Spec §User Story 22]
- [x] CHK004 Are external integration responsibilities documented for file upload, notifications, payment, public schedule publication, and ticketing? [Completeness, Spec §User Story 6, Spec §User Story 17, Spec §User Story 20, Spec §User Story 21, Spec §User Story 22]
- [x] CHK005 Are success end conditions explicitly specified for each use case? [Completeness, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK006 Is the login identifier requirement explicit about email vs username across UC-03 and UC-05? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §User Story 5]
- [x] CHK007 Are password validation requirements stated with explicit rules or explicitly marked as unspecified? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §User Story 4]
- [x] CHK008 Are manuscript file constraints stated with exact formats and size limits? [Clarity, Spec §User Story 6, Spec §User Story 8]
- [x] CHK009 Are reviewer assignment constraints stated precisely (exactly three reviewers, max five assignments)? [Clarity, Spec §User Story 10]
- [x] CHK010 Is the scope of public schedule visibility defined with who can view and when? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §User Story 20]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK011 Do login flows and failure handling align between UC-03 and UC-05? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §User Story 5]
- [x] CHK012 Are submission validation rules consistent between UC-06 and UC-08? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 6, Spec §User Story 8]
- [x] CHK013 Are reviewer workflow prerequisites consistent across UC-10 to UC-14 (assignment, acceptance, deadlines)? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 10, Spec §User Story 12, Spec §User Story 13, Spec §User Story 14]
- [x] CHK014 Are schedule states and transitions consistent across UC-18 to UC-20 (draft, edit, final)? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 18, Spec §User Story 19, Spec §User Story 20]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK015 Are acceptance scenarios written with measurable outcomes rather than ambiguous language? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]
- [x] CHK016 Do acceptance scenarios cover both success and failure paths for each user story? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]
- [x] CHK017 Do acceptance scenarios include traceable identifiers for use cases and AT suites? [Traceability, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]
- [x] CHK018 Are acceptance scenarios described as independently testable per user story? [Measurability, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK019 Are primary flows documented for every UC-01 to UC-23 use case? [Coverage, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]
- [x] CHK020 Are alternate flows documented where users choose different paths (e.g., save draft vs submit, accept vs decline)? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 6, Spec §User Story 9, Spec §User Story 13]
- [x] CHK021 Are exception flows specified for system or service failures across integrations? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 6, Spec §User Story 13, Spec §User Story 17, Spec §User Story 20, Spec §User Story 21, Spec §User Story 22]
- [x] CHK022 Are recovery behaviors defined for partial failures (e.g., payment success but ticket delayed)? [Coverage, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §User Story 22]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK023 Are invalid or duplicate registration inputs explicitly covered? [Edge Case, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §User Story 2]
- [x] CHK024 Are file format and file size boundary cases covered for submissions and replacements? [Edge Case, Spec §User Story 6, Spec §User Story 7]
- [x] CHK025 Are reviewer workload and reviewer count boundary cases explicitly covered? [Edge Case, Spec §User Story 10]
- [x] CHK026 Are deadline-closed cases defined for both review form access and submission? [Edge Case, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §User Story 12, Spec §User Story 14]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK027 Are performance, availability, or security requirements explicitly specified or explicitly excluded? [Gap, Spec §Scope]
- [x] CHK028 Are accessibility requirements defined for forms, dashboards, and public schedule pages? [Gap]
- [x] CHK029 Are browser support requirements explicitly stated in the spec? [Gap]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK030 Is the storage technology intentionally left abstract to avoid DB-specific assumptions? [Assumption, Spec §Scope]
- [x] CHK031 Are dependencies on external services defined with explicit responsibility boundaries? [Dependency, Spec §User Story 6, Spec §User Story 17, Spec §User Story 20, Spec §User Story 21, Spec §User Story 22]
- [x] CHK032 Is the source of pricing data and attendee categories specified? [Gap, Spec §User Story 23]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK033 Are terms like "valid password", "authorized user", and "role-based dashboard" defined with objective criteria? [Ambiguity, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §User Story 3]
- [x] CHK034 Are manuscript metadata requirements specified with explicit required vs optional fields? [Ambiguity, Spec §User Story 6]
- [x] CHK035 Are review form content requirements (fields, scales) clearly defined? [Gap, Spec §User Story 12, Spec §User Story 14]
- [x] CHK036 Is it unambiguous whether schedule publication notifications are required or optional? [Ambiguity, Spec §User Story 20]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
